title: Star Wars: Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan: The Aurorient Express

'''''Star Wars: Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan: The Aurorient Express''''' is a comic miniseries written by [[Mike Kennedy]] and drawn by [[Lucas Marangon]], starring [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]. The series is composed of 2 issues released in February and June [[2002]].

==Plot summary==
The plot is about a luxury cloud cruiser which has slipped out of control and is going to crash over [[Yorn Skot]]. The two [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] must board the runaway ship and regain control in just 84 minutes.

{{Plot}}
